personal.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Building products that solve real problems

hero.headline: I build software that
hero.subheadline: Senior Full-Stack Developer specializing in Shopify, SaaS, and custom web applications. 15+ years shipping code that clients keep coming back for.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate about building products that matter
paragraphs: I've been building web applications for over 15 years. Based in Kathmandu, Nepal, I've worked with startups, agencies, and enterprises across 15+ countries, mostly on Shopify stores, Django-based SaaS platforms, and WordPress sites.
I care a lot about understanding what you actually need before writing a single line of code. Clear communication upfront saves everyone time and money down the line.
Most of my clients are repeat clients. That's probably the best proof I can offer that the work speaks for itself.

workProcess.title: My Way of Working
workProcess.subtitle: A structured approach to deliver quality

steps.title: Feasibility Study
steps.description: Understanding your requirements, analyzing technical feasibility, and identifying potential challenges.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: Creating a detailed roadmap, defining milestones, and establishing clear communication channels.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Iterative development with regular check-ins, so the solution evolves with your feedback.

steps.title: Testing & QA
steps.description: Thorough testing for reliability, performance, and security before anything goes live.

steps.title: Deployment
steps.description: Smooth deployment with zero downtime, proper documentation, and knowledge transfer.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: Ongoing maintenance, updates, and support to keep your application running smoothly.

items.title: Clonify – UI Library Platform
items.description: SaaS platform with 1,000+ UI components for Framer and Figma. I built the whole thing: Next.js frontend, PayloadCMS backend, Paddle billing, and a browsing experience that stays fast with thousands of assets.

items.title: Powrbot – SaaS Data Automation
items.description: SaaS platform that automates company data lookup and enrichment. Upload a list of companies, get structured data back. I led the full-stack build: Django backend, Stripe billing, bulk processing with Celery, and role-based permissions.

items.title: Pollarise – Interactive Polling & Survey Platform
items.description: Polling and survey platform I built from scratch. Create polls, collect votes in real-time, and see results update live. Next.js on the frontend, FastAPI on the backend, PostgreSQL for storage, all deployed with CI/CD.

items.title: Ontreat – Restaurant Booking & Gifting Platform
items.description: Think Airbnb, but for restaurants. Customers browse menus, pick items, and book a treat for friends or family back in Nepal, even from abroad. Built with Django REST Framework with Stripe, E-Sewa, and NIBL payment gateways.

items.title: Shopify Development
items.description: Custom Shopify apps, theme development, and store optimization for maximum conversions.

items.title: Custom Web Applications
items.description: Full-stack web applications built to handle your specific business requirements, from SaaS platforms to internal tools.

items.title: API Integrations
items.description: Connect your app to third-party services, payment gateways (Stripe, Paddle, PayPal), and other systems through clean API integrations.

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Speed up your existing applications with caching, code optimization, and infrastructure tuning.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.description: Architecture reviews, code audits, and strategic technical guidance for your projects.

items.title: Long-term Support
items.description: Ongoing maintenance, updates, security patches, and feature development.

posts.title: My Journey: From Nepal to Global Tech
posts.excerpt: From tinkering with Python in 2009 to founding OctSpace, contributing WordPress plugins, speaking at WordCamps, and serving clients across 15+ countries — a look back at my journey.

posts.excerpt: Lessons learned from building apps that serve thousands of stores.

posts.excerpt: A practical comparison for building production-grade APIs.

posts.title: The Art of Client Communication
posts.excerpt: How clear communication leads to successful project outcomes.

items.quote: Working with Kishor has been an absolute pleasure. His expertise as a developer is evident in every project he takes on, demonstrating not only technical proficiency but also creativity in finding effective solutions. Kishor is professional, detail-oriented, and always ensures that the work meets the highest standards. His ability to quickly grasp project requirements and deliver beyond expectations sets him apart. I highly recommend Kishor for any development project—his dedication, skill, and professionalism are truly unmatched!
items.author: Omar E.

items.quote: I had the pleasure of working with Kishor, and I can't recommend him highly enough. He is not only a talented and skilled developer but also incredibly professional in his approach. Kishor consistently delivers high-quality work, meeting deadlines with ease and always going the extra mile to ensure everything runs smoothly. His ability to solve complex problems, coupled with his clear communication and collaborative mindset, makes him a standout in his field. If you're looking for a developer who is reliable, innovative, and dedicated to delivering excellent results, Kishor is the one!
items.author: Framer Plugin Client

items.quote: I have hired Kishor multiple times over the years to handle some pretty complex coding tasks and every time he manages to find a solution no matter how difficult the task. He has to be one of the most talented skilled freelancers we have ever come across as a company and will certainly continue hiring him for future projects.
items.author: Paul K.

items.quote: Kishor is a delight to work with, very professional and skilled with a deep understanding of business objectives and goals. His final results top-notch, very organized and professional. Highly recommended.
items.author: Clonify Plugin Client

items.quote: I hired Kishor to help with a heap of complex code changes to my Shopify store and his work has always been first-class. Not only is Kishor super-quick with answers to my questions and feedback on next steps, his work is always spot on. If you need a web developer to fix, alter or update your website...hire Kishor NOW.
items.author: Blake S.

items.quote: An absolutely fantastic hire! We had numerous requirements for this project and they were able to address each and every one of them, plus they did some additional work that was not included in the original project documentation.
items.author: Stripe Payment Client
